name: correspond9/-trading-nexus-v2:main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso

server.name: localhost
server.description: This is the server where Coolify is running on. Don't delete this!

docker_compose:
services:
  backend:
    build: .
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen(''http://127.0.0.1:8000/health'', timeout=5)" || exit 1'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 15s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 300s
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.rule=Host(`api.tradingnexus.pro`)
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.service=tradingbackend
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.entrypoints=http,https'
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.tls=true
      - traefik.http.services.tradingbackend.loadbalancer.server.port=8000
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.version=4.0.0-beta.463
      - coolify.applicationId=1
      - coolify.type=application
      - coolify.name=backend-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513324010
      - coolify.resourceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.projectName=my-first-project
      - coolify.serviceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.environmentName=production
      - coolify.pullRequestId=0
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.middlewares.gzip.compress=true
      - traefik.http.middlewares.http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-backend-stripprefix.stripprefix.prefixes=api.tradingnexus.pro
      - traefik.http.middlewares.redirect-to-https.redirectscheme.scheme=https
      - traefik.http.routers.http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-backend.entryPoints=http
      - 'traefik.http.routers.http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-backend.middlewares=http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-backend-stripprefix,gzip'
      - 'traefik.http.routers.http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-backend.rule=Host(``) && PathPrefix(`api.tradingnexus.pro`)'
      - 'caddy_0.encode=zstd gzip'
      - 'caddy_0.handle_path.0_reverse_proxy={{upstreams}}'
      - 'caddy_0.handle_path=api.tradingnexus.pro*'
      - caddy_0.header=-Server
      - 'caddy_0.try_files={path} /index.html /index.php'
      - 'caddy_0=://'
      - caddy_ingress_network=x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: 'postgresql://postgres:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:?POSTGRES_PASSWORD is required}@db:5432/trading_terminal'
      LOG_LEVEL: WARNING
      ENVIRONMENT: production
      CORS_ORIGINS_RAW: '${CORS_ORIGINS_RAW:-https://app.tradingnexus.pro,https://tradingnexus.pro,https://www.tradingnexus.pro,http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:5173}'
      DEBUG: 'false'
      STARTUP_LOAD_MASTER: 'true'
      STARTUP_LOAD_TIER_B: 'true'
      STARTUP_START_STREAMS: 'true'
      COOLIFY_BRANCH: '"main"'
      COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID: x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs
      COOLIFY_CONTAINER_NAME: backend-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513324010
      SERVICE_URL_BACKEND: api.tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_BACKEND: ''
      SERVICE_URL_FRONTEND: tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_FRONTEND: ''
      COOLIFY_URL: 'api.tradingnexus.pro://api.tradingnexus.pro'
      COOLIFY_FQDN: api.tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_NAME_BACKEND: backend
      SERVICE_NAME_DB: db
      SERVICE_NAME_REDIS: redis
      SERVICE_NAME_FRONTEND: frontend
    env_file:
      - .env
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    volumes:
      - '/data/coolify/applications/x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs/logs:/app/logs'
    restart: always
    container_name: backend-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513324010
    networks:
      x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs: null
  db:
    image: 'postgres:15-alpine'
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: trading_terminal
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: '${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:?POSTGRES_PASSWORD is required}'
      COOLIFY_BRANCH: '"main"'
      COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID: x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs
      COOLIFY_CONTAINER_NAME: db-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513346339
      SERVICE_URL_BACKEND: api.tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_BACKEND: ''
      SERVICE_URL_FRONTEND: tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_FRONTEND: ''
      SERVICE_NAME_BACKEND: backend
      SERVICE_NAME_DB: db
      SERVICE_NAME_REDIS: redis
      SERVICE_NAME_FRONTEND: frontend
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'pg_isready -U postgres'
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - 'x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs_postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data'
    restart: always
    container_name: db-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513346339
    labels:
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.version=4.0.0-beta.463
      - coolify.applicationId=1
      - coolify.type=application
      - coolify.name=db-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513346339
      - coolify.resourceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.projectName=my-first-project
      - coolify.serviceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.environmentName=production
      - coolify.pullRequestId=0
    networks:
      x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs: null
    env_file:
      - .env
  redis:
    image: 'redis:7-alpine'
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - ping
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - 'x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs_redis-data:/data'
    restart: always
    command: 'redis-server --appendonly yes'
    container_name: redis-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513364234
    labels:
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.version=4.0.0-beta.463
      - coolify.applicationId=1
      - coolify.type=application
      - coolify.name=redis-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513364234
      - coolify.resourceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso

      - coolify.serviceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.environmentName=production
      - coolify.pullRequestId=0
    networks:

    environment:
      COOLIFY_BRANCH: '"main"'
      COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID: x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs
      COOLIFY_CONTAINER_NAME: redis-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513364234
      SERVICE_URL_BACKEND: api.tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_BACKEND: ''
      SERVICE_URL_FRONTEND: tradingnexus.pro
      SERVICE_FQDN_FRONTEND: ''
      SERVICE_NAME_BACKEND: backend
      SERVICE_NAME_DB: db
      SERVICE_NAME_REDIS: redis
      SERVICE_NAME_FRONTEND: frontend
    env_file:
      - .env
  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      args:
        VITE_API_URL: '${VITE_API_URL:-/api/v2}'
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.rule=Host(`tradingnexus.pro`) || Host(`www.tradingnexus.pro`)'
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.entrypoints=http,https'
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.tls=true
      - traefik.http.services.tradingfrontend.loadbalancer.server.port=80
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.version=4.0.0-beta.463
      - coolify.applicationId=1
      - coolify.type=application
      - coolify.name=frontend-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-121513382346
      - coolify.resourceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.projectName=my-first-project
      - coolify.serviceName=correspond9-trading-nexus-v2main-q808cc0w88wcs488o4wwgoso
      - coolify.environmentName=production
      - coolify.pullRequestId=0
      - traefik.enable=true

      - traefik.http.middlewares.http-0-x8gg0og8440wkgc8ow0ococs-frontend-stripprefix.stripprefix.prefixes=tradingnexus.pro

docker_compose_raw:
services:
  backend:
    build: .
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen(''http://127.0.0.1:8000/health'', timeout=5)" || exit 1'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 15s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 300s
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.rule=Host(`api.tradingnexus.pro`)
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.service=tradingbackend
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.entrypoints=http,https'
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingbackend.tls=true
      - traefik.http.services.tradingbackend.loadbalancer.server.port=8000
    environment:
      - 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:?POSTGRES_PASSWORD is required}@db:5432/trading_terminal'
      - LOG_LEVEL=WARNING
      - ENVIRONMENT=production
      - 'CORS_ORIGINS_RAW=${CORS_ORIGINS_RAW:-https://app.tradingnexus.pro,https://tradingnexus.pro,https://www.tradingnexus.pro,http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:5173}'
      - DEBUG=false
      - STARTUP_LOAD_MASTER=true
      - STARTUP_LOAD_TIER_B=true
      - STARTUP_START_STREAMS=true
    env_file:
      - .env
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    volumes:
      - './logs:/app/logs'
    restart: always
  db:
    image: 'postgres:15-alpine'
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=trading_terminal
      - POSTGRES_USER=postgres
      - 'POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:?POSTGRES_PASSWORD is required}'
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'pg_isready -U postgres'
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - 'postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data'
    restart: always
  redis:
    image: 'redis:7-alpine'
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - ping
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - 'redis_data:/data'
    restart: always
    command: 'redis-server --appendonly yes'
  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      args:
        VITE_API_URL: '${VITE_API_URL:-/api/v2}'
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.rule=Host(`tradingnexus.pro`) || Host(`www.tradingnexus.pro`)'
      - 'traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.entrypoints=http,https'
      - traefik.http.routers.tradingfrontend.tls=true
      - traefik.http.services.tradingfrontend.loadbalancer.server.port=80
    environment:
      - 'VITE_API_URL=${VITE_API_URL:-/api/v2}'
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: always
volumes:
  postgres_data: null
  redis_data: null
networks:
  default:
    name: coolify
    external: true
